calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-30-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Louis Giannini, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Cristina Tallerico, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Robin E. Wilson.
Default was entered against defendant on November 19, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 2, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Cristina Tallerico, and against the Defaulted Defendant Robin E. Wilson as follows:

Past-due Rent - $6,000.00.
Holdover Damages - 34,401.72.
Costs - $250.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $40,651.72.

Additionally, plaintiff Cristina Tallerico is entitled to restitution and possession of the premises located at 3025 25th Street, San Francisco, CA 94110. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
